meaning: adj.缺乏信心的,不确信的,犹豫的
examples: The small white rabbit docile personality, unconfident.
I have been unconfident in whether this matter can be accomplished.
Despite the move, the latest data suggests that Brazilian companies remain unconfident about business prospects.
Ms Holland said research had shown that many parents were unconfident about talking to their children about sex.
Spike was a very quiet, shy withdrawn person and very unconfident.
